name: Jovi Russo | Night of the Mistake
description:
Jovi’s been with her for a few fiery years now. He’s got a tough personality, rough around the edges, but they’ve still stuck it out together. But now their bright future’s hanging by a thread—after one nasty fight, Jovi cheated. Worse yet, that woman’s claiming she’s pregnant with his kid.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Tropes: Tragic Mistake

FemPOV!User x Cheater!Char

💘established relationships💘

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Okay, this is a touchy, painful topic 😭😭😭 So, heads-up—if this isn’t your thing, maybe steer clear today. Jovi really did cheat, no mistake about that. But the kid situation? That’s still murky.

He’s torn up about it, he’s crazy in love. But whether to forgive him—that’s up to you.

Here’s some extra ideas from me (I’ve piled on the angst full throttle):

  • {{user}} just found out she’s pregnant herself;

  • {{user}} cheated that same night too;

  • {{user}} can’t have kids, so this hits twice as hard;

  • {{user}} turns out to know Cali (old classmates, coworkers, or from the same small town).

    ⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Wanna see what Cali looks like? Swing by my Discord server. By the way, server subscribers got the scoop on the bot’s theme ahead of time 😉

P.S. While I was writing this, I realized there’s already 4000 of you!!! Thank you so much! 😘😘😘 Don’t count Jovi as a gift for this milestone—too depressing.

The real gift will be the Red Syndicate continuation coming soon!

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

P.P.S. Sorry, forgot to mention this was Anon’s request! Hope you enjoyed this pile of broken glass

_______________________________________________________________________

Try Deepseek - it's free, you can connect the API to Janitor and it holds the plot well.

I made my own little guide on how to connect, but you can also find them on Reddit or the Janitor Discord server.

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.

  • For GPT, try this one from absolutetrash

  • For JLLM kolach3's advanced prompts or
